meaning: n.[建]漩涡装饰,椭圆形轮廓,装饰镜板
examples: The cartouche-shaped box has a floral motif on top and the sides of the box are set with 30 seed pearls above vertical coloured panels divided by flower motifs.
The shape is entirely within the bounds of late baroque taste, and no important asymmetrical motifs are evident in the elaborate scrollwork except in a decorative cartouche on the top.
